title: SETU Space Industry and Education Workshop: Erasmus+ Blended Intensive Programme (BIP)
description: The programme provides students and academic staff with an opportunity to engage with experts from the space engineering and industry sectors, focusing on space mission planning, proposal development, and emerging opportunities in the space industry.

title: ESA CubeSat Hands-On Training Week
description: This Training Week is a great opportunity for university students to get hands-on experience with CubeSats and to apply theoretical knowledge obtained from classroom lectures.

title: ESA Human Space Physiology Training Course 2026
description: The Human Space Physiology Training Course provides university students with a comprehensive introduction to the physiological challenges of human spaceflight.
